SpecialPageCaptchaCookieTTL.description: The time to live (TTL) in seconds for the cookie set by the extension, which allows the user to bypass the CAPTCHA. The default is 1800 (seconds), i.e. 60 seconds * 30 minutes.

SpecialPageCaptchaWhitelist.description: A whitelist of special pages which will never show the CAPTCHA. Special:Captcha is provided by the ConfirmEdit extension and it's the help page about CAPTCHAs, whereas the log in/log out pages are provided by MW core and their inclusion here oughta be self-explanatory.
